content: شُوَيَة تَوابِل عَلى الأكل بِتَغَيُّر طَعمُه خَالِص
translations: eng:a little spice on food changes the taste completely

transcriptions.arabizi: shuwaya tawaebil Aala il'aklabitighayyar taAm|uh chaalis
